definitions.name: filter:where:dept_stats.avg_los
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where dept_stats.avg_los is greater than 5

definitions.name: avg_los
definitions.business_description: Average of DAY, Hospital admission date and time, Hospital discharge date and time
conditions: Hospital discharge date and time is not null

definitions.name: filter:where:PAT_ENC_HSP.HOSP_DISCH_TIME
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Hospital discharge date and time is not null
